mapper.sql: id, name, email, phone, company_id, title, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM person ORDER BY name
SELECT FROM person WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY name
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.email, p.phone, p.company_id, p.title, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM person p JOIN person_tag pt ON pt.person_id = p.id WHERE pt.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY p.name
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.email, p.phone, p.company_id, p.title, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM person p JOIN deal_person dp ON dp.person_id = p.id WHERE dp.deal_id = #{dealId} ORDER BY p.name
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO person_tag (person_id, tag_id) VALUES (#{personId}, #{tagId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM person_tag WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO person_tag (person_id, tag_id) VALUES
(#{personId}, #{tagId})
